title: YTPMV - King Harkinian vs Lady GaGa : ScrubGame
description:
King Harkinian and Lady GaGa face off! The two popular songs "Scrub Scrub Scrub" (Harkinian) and "LoveGame" (GaGa) fuse together to create ScrubGame. Vocals and Instrumentals from both songs can be heard here... and while the video is nothing special, the audio is something people will (hopefully) enjoy.

It has been a over a year since i've actually edited videos... maybe I shouldn't have done something so complex. lol.
